title: Fix structured tool outcomes — stop collapsing ActionOutcome to binary success/failure
description:
From sprint35_audit finding 4 (95% confidence): ActionOutcome exposes rich OutcomeType enum (Completed, NoProgress, Failed, Blocked, Unreachable, TimedOut), but CallWithOutcomeAsync maps only ToolResult.Success to success and everything else to Failed. This loses the semantic detail that ActionOutcome was designed to preserve.

Fix: Map each ToolResult status to the corresponding ActionOutcome.OutcomeType. Update CallWithOutcomeAsync (or its caller) to preserve the richer semantics so recovery/replanning can distinguish blocked from unreachable from timed out.

Source: sprint35_audit (Finding 4)
